column4: Tallerico et al. Section IV-A direct component-selection statement for the in-house NASA motorettes
column5: The source identifies DuPont Nomex 410 aramid paper and states that 0.08 mm thick paper was used between the M15 core and winding. Reference 18 identifies the 2016 technical data sheet, but the campaign does not report product lot, measured thickness, thickness tolerance, paper orientation, moisture conditioning, dielectric test, thermal-property test, uncertainty, or confidence metadata. This is the selected liner thickness in that stack, not a generic Nomex 410 design allowable
